  --skip-zuul \
  --skip-deps \
  --run selenium

  -it \
  --rm \
  --entrypoint=quibble-with-supervisord \
  -v /home/z/Documents/gitlab/zfilipin/quibble-local/cache:/cache \
  -v /home/z/Documents/gitlab/zfilipin/quibble-local/log:/workspace/log \
  -v /home/z/Documents/gitlab/zfilipin/quibble-local/ref:/srv/git:ro \

  -e CI=true \
  -e ZUUL_PROJECT=mediawiki/skins/MinervaNeue \
  docker-registry.wikimedia.org/releng/quibble-bullseye-php83:latest \
  --dry-run \
  --skip-zuul \
  --skip-deps \
  --run selenium
